scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./dalal-app" --filter "./api-server" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.prod:build: pnpm --filter @workspace/dalal-app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
